description: Connect w/ Jonathan & team to build prototype for AI-powered RFP response service. Gather 10-50 historical RFPs, 1 new RFP for testing, client data for context. Create workflow w/ 2 embeds - historical upload & new RFP upload. Integrate w/ existing database.
Research & decide between AirOps & N8N for prototype development based on Marcel's recommendations.
Circle back to Marcel w/ prototype info & demo in ~1-2 weeks. Prepare Loom video demo if necessary.
